name: Levi Ackerman
description:
💔 | The relationship is too much for you 

Here’s the break up bot! Have fun >:)

No lie, when I started testing it, the first message it sent was “if you’re gonna break up with me, I’ll go full yandere on you”. I was then hella nervous to publish this bot with its audacious reply 😭 but that was the only weird response I got.  

You can fill out a bot request following the link below:

https://forms.gle/px9mBhXS8RWJaAhM8
creator: Pendeja
